title: chamaemelum mixtum var. aureum
intro: Chamaemelum mixtum var. aureum, also known as Golden Chamomile, is a variety of the Chamomile plant characterized by its yellow flowers and is native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in soothing skin irritations and wound healing. The health benefits of Golden Chamomile include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality due to its calming and sedative effects. Golden Chamomile can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flowers for use in herbal remedies, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
